patients.name: Karen Kim
patients.notes: Previously poor control (HbA1c 8.9% in Feb 2024), escalated to GLP-1 in April 2024. Improved to 7.4% by August. Nephropathy screening flagged early CKD stage 2.

patients.name: Lucas Lane
patients.notes: Recently diagnosed at age 22. On insulin pump since July 2024. HbA1c improving (7.1% -> 6.8%). Celiac requires gluten-free diet which complicates carb counting.

patients.name: Margaret Moore
patients.notes: Long-standing T2D with macrovascular complications. HbA1c has been persistently above target. Candidate for SGLT-2 inhibitor given CVD history. Peripheral neuropathy affecting feet — requires regular podiatry.

patients.name: Noah Nguyen
patients.notes: Well-controlled long-term T1D on closed-loop pump (hybrid). Also manages Hashimoto's — thyroid levels checked annually. Active lifestyle, runs marathons, requires carb adjustments for exercise.
